summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned because this shard is not a dedupe cluster, closure/low-signal cleanup is disabled by the artifact permissions, merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter, and several PRs have missing check hydration from the GraphQL rate limit. All listed refs are open pull requests with live updated_at values from the preflight artifact; no security-sensitive item was detected.
